[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000011000 2
1 011000011 4
2 000000000 a
3 000101101 4
4 101010011 5
5 110100000 3
6 001011111 6
7 011011001 5
